name: Enoch
oracleText:
Vigilance
Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, exile Enoch, then return him to the battlefield under his owner's control.
When Enoch enters the battlefield, scry 2.
flavorText: "And Enoch walked with God: and he was not; for God took him." — Genesis 5:24
notes: Early World secondary figure card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for God took Enoch.
title: Walker with God
